props.covers: Step 2 of the worked example: the stage becomes the runner loop — a 1x4 grid of identical cells at the loose 96 gap, ending in a decision cell.

text.insert: The stage becomes the runner loop:
— one row of four identical cells at the loose 96 gap (R4, R2), ending in a decision cell. The new section frames itself with R3 trim; the config lane does not move.

row 1|4
  section 1 text=config label="Config" hug=NW
    group
      item 2 text=checkout type=pill size=M at=N
      item 3 text=goals type=pill size=M at=C
      item 4 text=secrets type=pill size=M at=S
  section 5 text=loop label="Runner loop"
    grid 1x4 gap=96
      item 6 text=cli type=process size=M
      item 7 text=sched type=process size=M
      item 8 text=workers type=process size=M
      item 9 text=match type=decision size=M

arrows
